author: gowtham0992
name: Universal Transformer: Depth Recurrence with Weight Sharing + Iteration Embeddings
blurb: 3 unique blocks x 4 iterations = 12 effective layers with per-iteration learnable embeddings (timestep encoding from Dehghani et al. 2018). 70% param savings (8.1M vs 27M), 4.95 MB artifact. Sliding window eval only. 8xH100 SXM, 5466 steps at 101ms/step.
